arts.sum: Parma need to quickly put aside their 5-0 defeat to Roma on Sunday as they prepare to host Monza in this round. The Bagai are coming off a 2-1 defeat to Juventus on Sunday that cost Alessandro Nesta ...

arts.ttl: Serie A | Parma v Monza: Match Preview
arts.sum: As 2024 comes to an end, Parma and Monza prepare to face off in a pivotal Serie A encounter at the Stadio Ennio Tardini on Saturday afternoon. Both sides enter the match looking to climb out of the relegation zone, with Parma sitting 15th and Monza languishing at the bottom of the table. The post Serie A | Parma v Monza: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.
